title: Ice Track
description: Have a race on the ice cutting through the path!
body:
## Descrition
This datapack/mod allows you to create a road of ice while riding a boat.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e06423ee6205e635134217b4bf97c875a3eeb1e5_0.webp)

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
